channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump’s ‘gold card’ visas were supposed to solve the $39 trillion national debt. They’ve only sold one
item.description: Gold card revenue "may be earmarked for deficit reduction, but it actually could be more money than that," Trump previously told reporters.

item.title: When Medicine Becomes Content—The New Risks Patients Don’t Always See
item.description: As doctors enter the creator economy, building brands and monetizing expertise, the line between medical advice and marketing is becoming harder to di...

item.title: The metrics driving Verizon’s turnaround
item.description: Under new CEO Dan Schulman, Verizon posted its first positive Q1 postpaid net adds in more than a decade.

item.title: Trump’s Labor Secretary: We’re rewriting the rules on joint employment. Here’s what businesses need to know
item.description: This proposed rule would give employers — and employees — a clearer test for determining when two companies share legal responsibility for the same wo...
